seoTitle: Collum Collum vs Colly Blue — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Collum Collum and Colly Blue. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Collum Collum vs Colly Blue: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Collum Collum and Colly Blue.
heading: Collum Collum vs Colly Blue — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Collum Collum, New South Wales and Colly Blue, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Collum Collum has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Colly Blue (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Collum Collum or Colly Blue safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Collum Collum has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Colly Blue scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Collum Collum scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Colly Blue scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Collum Collum or Colly Blue?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Collum Collum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
